title: podochilus longilabris
intro: Podochilus longilabris is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Podochilus longilabris include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is used in traditional medicine and can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are available in various herbal preparations.
